title: Diploma in Civil Engineering Colleges in Noida | Galgotias University
content: Three year Diploma in Civil Engineering is all about the infrastructural development and design techniques. The root of civilization is based on civil engineering, now a day as we know India is a developing country and is taking many infrastructural developments works in urban as well as rural areas. Civil engineering deals with the highway projects as pavement design, it also deals with the structural design and concerned with the health and public utility services like as public health engineering. Samsung C&T, in collaboration with Galgotias University and NGO partner NABET India, is offering full tuition fee scholarships under Project Build for Nation for students enrolling in Diploma (Lateral Entry) programs in Mechanical, Civil, and Electrical Engineering. The initiative also includes a 2-year certified AutoCAD training to enhance industry readiness. 10th with minimum 40% marks. For Lateral Entry: Minimum 40% require in 10+2 examination with Physics/ Mathematics / Chemistry/ Computer Science/ Electronics/ Information Technology/ Informatics Practices Technical Vocational subject/ Engineering Graphics Or 10th (minimum 40%) + 2 year ITI (minimum 40%) shall be eligible for admission to Second Year Diploma Course(s) in Any branch of Engineering and Technology. The core modules include courses on Geology, Soil, Fluids, Foundation, Structure, Environment and Design. Program Structure01 The program aims to develop technically skilled professionals in the field of Civil Engineering with a strong foundation in planning, design, construction, and maintenance of infrastructure. It prepares students to work effectively in construction industries, government departments, and consultancy firms by imparting practical skills, sustainable practices, and ethical values. The course also encourages innovation and lifelong learning to meet the evolving demands of the construction sector. 01 Basic knowledge: An ability to apply knowledge of basic mathematics, science and engineering to solve the engineering problems. 02 Discipline knowledge: An ability to apply discipline - specific knowledge to solve core and/or applied engineering problems. 03 Experiments and practice: An ability to plan and perform experiments and practices and to use the results to solve engineering problems. 04 Engineering tools: Apply appropriate technologies and tools with an understanding of the limitations. 05 The engineer and society: Demonstrate knowledge to assess societal, health, safety, legal and cultural issues and the consequent responsibilities relevant to engineering practice. 06 Environment and sustainability: Understand the impact of the professional engineering solutions in societal and environmental contexts, and demonstrate the knowledge of, and need for sustainable development. 07 Ethics: Apply ethical principles and commit to professional ethics and responsibilities and norms of the engineering practice 08 Individual and team work: Function effectively as an individual, and as a member or leader in diverse teams, and in multidisciplinary settings. 09 Communication: An ability to communicate effectively. 10 Life-long learning: Recognize the need for, and have the preparation and ability to engage in independent and life-long learning in the context of technological changes. 01 Successful engineer with vast experience. 02 Have large opportunities and knowledge for growth in carrier. 03 Function successfully in a professional environment by utilizing and enhancing their problem-solving and communication skills. 01 Skill to perform various tests to select good quality materials by using modern techniques and equipment. 02 Knowledge and ability to Run various computer based programs to solve field problems. 10th with minimum 40% marks. For Lateral Entry: Minimum 40% require in 10+2 examination with Physics/ Mathematics / Chemistry/ Computer Science/ Electronics/ Information Technology/ Informatics Practices Technical Vocational subject/ Engineering Graphics Or 10th (minimum 40%) + 2 year ITI (minimum 40%) shall be eligible for admission to Second Year Diploma Course(s) in Any branch of Engineering and Technology.
